_note: Archie's cron jobs. Seeded fresh on every container start by seed-crons.py. `deliver_to` fields support {ENV_VAR} substitution resolved at runtime.

jobs.name: session-reset
jobs.description: Daily context reset — keeps token usage lean

jobs.name: daily-heartbeat
jobs.description: Daily 9 AM ET — check Notion tasks and nudge the team as needed
jobs.message:
Read SOUL.md, TEAM.md, MEMORY.md, HEARTBEAT.md, and notion.md from your workspace. Run your daily heartbeat as defined in HEARTBEAT.md.

First, fetch fresh from Notion per notion.md (API-post-search, drop Done/Cancelled) and overwrite /app/workspace/TASKS.json.

If today is Monday: post the weekly digest — all open tasks grouped by Owner, mapping each Owner to its <@DISCORD_ID> via notion.md.

Otherwise: from that data, nudge only tasks due today, tomorrow, in 2 days, or overdue. Only post if someone needs a nudge. If everything is on track, reply with exactly NO_REPLY.

Never ping before 9 AM or after 6 PM ET. Vary your phrasing — never use the same wording twice.
